examples.text: A bit cynically, Bass describes colleagues who never published because they waited so long they became ill or died.
examples.explanation: 巴斯略带讽刺地描述了那些因等待过久而患病或去世、从未发表过论文的同事。

reviewSessions.example_text: A bit cynically, Bass describes colleagues who never published because they waited so long they became ill or died.
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案基本正确，抓住了“讽刺地”，但缺少“略带”这一语气程度。
matched_points: 理解了 cynical 在此处表示“讽刺地”
missing_points: 未体现“A bit”带来的“略带、稍微”语气
